nasb.text: King Solomon made 200 large shields of beaten gold, using 600 shekels of beaten gold on each large shield.

esv.text: King Solomon made 200 large shields of beaten gold; 600 shekels of beaten gold went into each shield.

cnv.text: 所羅門王用錘煉好的金子做了二百面大盾牌，每一面大盾牌用錘煉好的金子七公斤。

ccb.text: 所罗门王用锤好的金子打造了二百面大盾牌，每面用七公斤金子；
